ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city for which the data is recorded */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data entry */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded (in Fahrenheit) */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature recorded (in Fahrenheit) */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity level (in percentage) */,
  "cloudiness" REAL /* Cloudiness level (in percentage) */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed (in mph) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation (in inches) */,
  "snowfall" REAL /* Amount of snowfall (in inches) */,
  "solar_radiation" REAL /* Solar radiation (in W/m²) */,
  "air_quality_index" INTEGER /* Air Quality Index (AQI) */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographical region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the city */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographical region */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the city (in meters) */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the city data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographical region */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the country (in square kilometers) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the country data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographical region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the region data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "reliability_rating" REAL /* Reliability rating of the data source (0-100) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the data source data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login timestamp */,
  "active" INTEGER /* User account status (active or inactive) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the user data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user during access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the quality record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related weather data */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy percentage of the weather data */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the quality check */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes regarding the quality assessment */,
  "verified_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who verified the data */,
  "verification_method" TEXT /* Method used for verification */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the quality record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version record */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related weather data */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data record */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes in this version */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the version record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
